text.title: mutation-testing-ci-gate Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the mutation-testing-ci-gate methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-tool-per-stack
step.action: Lookup mutator per language (Stryker for TS, Mutmut for Python, Pitest for JVM).

step.name: baseline-run
step.action: Run a full baseline mutation; record per-module kill rates.

step.name: set-module-floors
step.action: Set initial floors = baseline - 10% (lax); document ratchet plan.

step.name: ship-shadow-mode
step.action: Add CI job with continue-on-error: true; collect 14 days.

step.name: triage-survivors
step.action: Run triage script; tag equivalent mutants; exclude from kill-rate.
step.decision-gate: Untriaged survivors inflate the noise count.

step.name: flip-to-blocking
step.action: After 14 days with noise < 10%, remove continue-on-error per module.
